basics.name: RUSEN BIRBEN
basics.summary: AI & Data Engineering graduate from Istanbul Technical University. Building intelligent systems with NLP, LLMs, and agentic AI applications.
basics.printSummary: AI & Data Engineering graduate from Istanbul Technical University with experience in NLP, LLMs, and agentic AI applications. Co-founder of Fiction Studios, an AI startup at Bilkent Cyberpark building LLM-powered tools for museums and tourists.

experience.description: Lead METU NLP Connect, the lab's YouTube channel: expert interviews, educational explainers on LLMs and modern NLP, and recent-paper spotlights. Member of the Applied NLP Group (led by Asst. Prof. Çağrı Toraman), working on LLMs, generative AI, and Turkish language technologies.
Co-founded an AI startup at Bilkent Cyberpark, an accredited Turkish Teknokent. Built an LLM-powered guide app for museums and tourists. Wound down in 2026.
Built AI automations and agentic LLM implementations for Phillip Capital subsidiary. Intelligent systems for operations and customer-facing platforms.
Researched LLMs for financial applications: forecasting, sentiment analysis, tool usage, reasoning, and RAG implementations.
AIOps research using software log data for predictive maintenance. Generated demos on HDFS logs.

projects.title: Tobor
projects.subtitle: Amazon Warehouse Robot
projects.description: Autonomous warehouse robot simulating Amazon logistics. Pathfinding, obstacle avoidance, task scheduling. Human/cargo detection with custom YOLO.

projects.title: Biting The Bytes
projects.subtitle: Turkish Diacritic Restoration
projects.description: T5-based transformer for restoring Turkish diacritics. Automatically adds accent marks and special characters for enhanced readability.

projects.title: AIZheimer
projects.subtitle: Machine Unlearning on SD
projects.description: Selectively removed concepts from Stable Diffusion 2.1 while preserving other capabilities. Content moderation and AI output customization.

projects.title: To-AI-or-Not-to-AI
projects.subtitle: GPT Detector
projects.description: Ensemble method to detect AI-generated text using three fine-tuned models. Addresses academic integrity and misinformation concerns.

projects.title: Anime Recommender
projects.subtitle: Collaborative Filtering
projects.description: Personalized anime recommendations combining collaborative filtering and content-based approaches. RMSE: 0.289, MAE: 0.213.

awards.title: 1416 YLSY Scholarship · M.Sc. & Ph.D.
awards.summary: Türkiye's flagship state scholarship for graduate study abroad, established under Law No. 1416 (1929). Funds tuition, living stipend, travel, and exam fees for master's and doctoral programs in exchange for mandatory service at a Turkish university or public institution.

courses.title: Deep Learning Specialization
courses.summary: Sequence Models, CNNs, NN and DL basics, Structuring ML Projects, Improving Deep NNs.

courses.title: AWS Cloud Technical Essentials
courses.summary: Core AWS concepts, security practices, EC2, Lambda, ECS, RDS, DynamoDB, S3.
